Manvi Pant
+91 8218952332 | manvi2000p@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/manvi-pant-04/ | github.com/manvi-pant04
Professional Summary
Front-end developer with 3 years of experience specializing in React.js and Azure-based applications. Experienced
in modernizing legacy systems and building user-friendly scalable web interfaces. Proven track record of
end-to-end migration projects and cloud-based integrations using Azure Function Apps. Passionate about crafting

clean, maintainable code and delivering impactful user experiences.

Banasthali Vidyapith University, Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science

May 2022 – Present

maintainability and performance optimization.

maintainability and performance optimization.
